query: SELECT p.id, p.name, s.name as subcategory, p.instorePrice, p.deliveryPrice, p.mochiPrice1pc, p.mochiPrice2pc, p.mochiPrice3pc FROM products p JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Mochi%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, s.name as subcategory, p.instorePrice, p.deliveryPrice, p.mochiPrice1pc, p.mochiPrice2pc, p.mochiPrice3pc FROM products p JOIN subcategories s ON p.subcategoryId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Mochi%' LIMIT 10;
